flagged_fuzzy_step_traces.story: Lynn was always arguing with her mother's husband James. Lynn asked her daughter, Felicia, if she would like to go to a movie with her on Saturday night. Felicia was excited because today she was going to the zoo with her uncle Francisco.

Tina and her uncle Francisco went to the pet shop. Tina saw a puppy that she loved, so Francisco bought it for her. Frances went to the mall, because she wanted to look for a present for her daughter, Lena. Lena had picked her daughter Tina out the cutest new dress to wear on her birthday.

Marie went to the baseball game with her uncle Joshua. Marie went to dinner with her daughter David. They then went to the park afterwards. Frances asked her daughter, David, if she would like to go to a movie with her on Saturday night.

Pedro and his wife, Dorothy just got married in Las Vegas last month. Pedro was driving to pick up his daughter Rebecca and her brother James. Pedro was glad that James was able to spend time with his grandmother Shantel.

James and his aunt, Marie, were n't on speaking terms. Nobody remembered what the disagreement was anymore, but it had lasted for years. Shantel was so proud of her daughter Marie for getting straight A's this semester. Dorothy and her son James went shopping to get Dorothy 'husband Pedro a birthday gift yesterday.

honesty_caveats: CLUTRR is a TEMPLATED kinship benchmark (max 871 chars), not natural text
gaps are composition CELLS, not ontology/common-sense grounding
manufactured gaps are clearly labelled and separated from natural gaps
a non-sound LLM fill is the silent-wrong-narrowing failure mode -> reported as confident-wrong
Mode-S and the raw_llm baseline see the same story; the neuro-symbolic system invokes the LLM ONLY on gap cells and uses the exact table elsewhere

verdict.summary: LLM abstract composition-cell exact-match falls with algebra richness (point=0.67/3rels, rcc8=0.52/8rels, allen=0.38/13rels; allen soundness only 0.44), so an LLM composes RICH algebras poorly and a non-sound fill is a silent-wrong-narrowing hazard. on CLUTRR kinship -- where the LLM knows the composition calculus (Mode-P cell accuracy 1.0) -- CELL-level gap-filling (symbolic does the multi-hop chaining, the LLM supplies only the missing atomic rule) recovers gap coverage at precision=1.00 (net +391), verdict=YES. by contrast STORY-level filling (asking the LLM to do the multi-hop read) recovers at only precision=0.33 (net -133) -- naive story gap-fill is NOT net-faithful. the cell-fill neuro-symbolic system cuts the confident-wrong (hallucination) rate by 100% vs the raw-LLM CoT baseline (0.522 -> 0.000) at FULL coverage.
